---
title: "Basic"
description: "Learning Path description"
author:
  - name: Author One
  - name: Author Two
date: "04/18/2026"
date-modified: now
order: 0
draft: true
image: "assets/img/thumbnail.png"
categories:
  - Learning Path
# other-links:     
#   - text: Template Download
#     href: assets/project-template.zip
#     icon: file-zip
# resources:
#  - assets/project-template.zip
#order: -1
#listing:
#  sort-ui: true
#  sort:
#    - "order"
#    - "date"
#    - "title desc"
#  contents:
#    - "/*/*.qmd"
---
